place: Seaside Society, Southwest Lombok, West Nusa Tenggara, Indonesia
title: Elevated Sea-View Villa with Infinity Pool & Yoga Deck, Lombok
blurb: An architect-designed hillside retreat on Lombok's quiet southwest coast — bold lines and a vivid mix of materials framing sweeping ocean, rice-field and sunset views. Four en-suite bedrooms, a 74 m² infinity pool with a shallow children's section, and a dedicated yoga deck.
detail:
An elevated retreat surrounded by lush greenery on Lombok's tranquil southwest coast, this architect-designed villa (by Cáceres + Tous) offers unrivalled ocean and rice-field views with some of the island's most spectacular sunsets. Across 949 m² — 177 m² of indoor living wrapped in 772 m² of terraces and gardens — the bold lines and vivid combination of materials make the four-bedroom home feel at once grand and serene, conceived for retreats, slow living and multi-generational stays.

A multifunctional yoga space greets you at the entrance, setting the calm tone, while each of the four bedrooms has its own en-suite bathroom and a double bed. Expansive open social areas flow effortlessly between gathering and rest, opening to vast terraces and outdoor seating with uninterrupted views of the sea and the rice fields. At the centre, a 74 m² infinity pool with a shallow section for children and a pool shower invites long, light-filled days; after sundown the villa is spectacularly illuminated for an enchanting evening atmosphere.

Stays come fully serviced with daily breakfast, housekeeping, turndown and 24-hour security, with in-villa dining, spa treatments, transportation, tailored activities and a sports centre available on request — a private, design-led base within an established seaside community in Sekotong, southwest Lombok.
